projects.summary: Developed an energy trading platform for ABC Energy, enabling them to manage their energy trading activities efficiently. The platform included modules for trade capture, position monitoring, risk analysis, and reporting, providing ABC Energy with real-time insights and enhancing their decision-making process.
responsibilities: Collaborated with stakeholders to gather requirements
Designed and developed trading platform modules
Performed testing and deployment

projects.title: Commodity Price Forecasting System
projects.shortSummary: Developed a commodity price forecasting system for XYZ Commodities.
projects.summary: Developed a commodity price forecasting system for XYZ Commodities, leveraging advanced statistical models and machine learning algorithms. The system utilized historical data, market indicators, and external factors to generate accurate price forecasts, helping XYZ Commodities make informed trading decisions and optimize their profitability.
responsibilities: Developed forecasting algorithms and models
Integrated data sources and market indicators
Evaluated model performance and accuracy

projects.title: Risk Management Dashboard
projects.shortSummary: Developed a risk management dashboard for EFG Trading.
projects.summary: Developed a risk management dashboard for EFG Trading, providing a comprehensive view of their trading positions, risk exposure, and compliance metrics. The dashboard included interactive visualizations, alerts, and scenario analysis tools, enabling EFG Trading to proactively manage risks and ensure regulatory compliance.
responsibilities: Designed and developed the risk management dashboard
Integrated data from multiple sources
Implemented risk monitoring and alerting mechanisms

projects.title: Automated Trade Settlement System

projects.summary: Developed an automated trade settlement system for LMN Traders, streamlining the trade confirmation, invoicing, and settlement processes. The system integrated with external trading platforms, financial systems, and clearinghouses, reducing manual effort, minimizing errors, and ensuring timely settlement of trades.
responsibilities: Collaborated with operations teams to understand settlement workflows
Developed system components for trade confirmation and invoicing
Integrated with external systems and APIs

projects.title: Market Data Integration
projects.shortSummary: Integrated market data feeds for PQR Energy.
projects.summary: Integrated market data feeds from various sources for PQR Energy, ensuring real-time access to market prices, indices, and other relevant data. The integration involved data normalization, API integration, and data quality validation, providing PQR Energy with accurate and up-to-date market information for their trading activities.
responsibilities: Identified and evaluated market data providers
Implemented data integration and normalization processes
Performed data quality checks and validation

projects.title: Energy Portfolio Optimization
projects.shortSummary: Developed an energy portfolio optimization system for LMN Power.
projects.summary: Developed an energy portfolio optimization system for LMN Power, enabling them to optimize their energy trading strategies and maximize portfolio profitability. The system utilized mathematical optimization models, historical data, and market forecasts to generate optimal trading recommendations, helping LMN Power achieve better trading outcomes.
responsibilities: Designed and implemented optimization algorithms
Integrated data sources and market forecasts
Conducted performance analysis and backtesting

projects.title: Compliance Reporting System

projects.summary: Developed a compliance reporting system for ABC Commodities, enabling them to generate regulatory reports and comply with industry regulations. The system automated the generation of trade reports, position reports, and regulatory filings, reducing manual effort and ensuring timely and accurate compliance reporting.
responsibilities: Collaborated with compliance teams to define reporting requirements
Developed report generation modules
Implemented data validation and quality checks

projects.title: Algorithmic Trading System

projects.summary: Developed an algorithmic trading system for XYZ Traders, enabling them to execute automated trading strategies based on predefined rules and market signals. The system incorporated real-time data feeds, order routing mechanisms, and risk management controls, allowing XYZ Traders to execute trades quickly and efficiently.
responsibilities: Designed and developed trading algorithms
Integrated with market data providers and trading platforms
Implemented risk management controls

projects.title: Trading Analytics Dashboard

The dashboard included interactive charts, performance metrics, and scenario analysis tools, empowering EFG Commodities to make data-driven trading decisions and optimize their trading strategies.

projects.title: Trade Reconciliation System
projects.shortSummary: Developed a trade reconciliation system for PQR Traders.
projects.summary: Developed a trade reconciliation system for PQR Traders, automating the reconciliation process for trade data across multiple systems and counterparties. The system matched and verified trade details, resolved discrepancies, and generated reconciliation reports, ensuring accurate and timely settlement of trades.
responsibilities: Analyzed trade reconciliation workflows
Developed matching and verification algorithms
Implemented reconciliation reporting and exception handling
Collaborated with cross-functional teams to deliver software solutions
Participated in code reviews and quality assurance
Provided technical support and troubleshooting

Working at Midas has provided me with opportunities to contribute to the development of innovative communication software and gain valuable experience in the telecommunications industry.
